Step 2: Pump draws water from tank. Tank level is 15%.

Answer 3: Same outcome - refill valve activates, sprinklers don't run. The only difference from removing the sensor is that the pump now runs even when it has rained, but the tank level condition still determines sprinkler vs refill valve behavior.
